series_metadata.series_description: Inspection Reports reveal data complied by the examiners during their Inspection of a plant. The form discloses the name and location of the company, date of inspection, as well as, the result of his interview with a representative of the company. Also,

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Maintain machine readable records on AS 400 or Novell computer system, information is superseded by new information or records series is no longer created ; Paper: hard copy records
